narrative:
Orange Twp township has 825 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.3%, a clear Republican lean of 9.0 percentage points.
